title: Epic: Core omnidist CLI implementation
Expand test coverage for release pipeline paths
description: Add table-driven tests for version resolution, npm config validation, stage/verify behaviors, and publish argument construction to prevent release regressions.
notes: Added unit tests for shim generation, npm distribution validation, version resolution (env/file/errors), and publish argument construction. Remaining: add stage/verify integration-style tests around artifact/version parity flows.
close_reason: Expanded release-path coverage with tests for config/version resolution, publish args, and stage+verify integration mismatch detection.

title: Refactor CLI: move business logic into internal packages
description: Keep cmd/ as entrypoints only. Move build/init/npm stage/verify/publish/version/config validation logic to internal packages with clear APIs and tests.
close_reason: Moved build/init/npm stage/verify/publish business logic to internal/workflow packages. cmd now contains thin Cobra entrypoints and config loading only. Migrated tests to internal/workflow/npm.

title: Prepare v0.1.3 release (without npm publish)
description: Run quality gates, tag v0.1.3, stage and verify npm artifacts, push commits and tag. Do not run npm publish.

title: Publish npm patch release for platform package resolution
description: Published @omnidist/omnidist@0.1.1 fails at runtime on global install because shim expects platform package as sibling directory. Need release with require.resolve-based platform package lookup and verify global install on linux/mac/windows.
notes: Code fix committed in b1ce231: shim now resolves @scope/pkg-<platform> via require.resolve. Remaining work: stage/publish v0.1.2 and verify npm i -g @omnidist/omnidist works on target platforms.
close_reason: v0.1.2 tagged, published, and install verified by user.

title: Honor npm registry/access config in publish
description: npm publish currently hardcodes --access public and ignores configured distribution registry unless explicit CLI override is provided. Use config defaults and only override when flags are set.

title: Epic: Add uv distribution backend (dual npm + uv)
description: Add first-class uv backend to omnidist while keeping npm fully supported. Scope includes uv CLI commands, uv workflow backend, config/init updates, tests, and migration docs.
notes: Planned scope: additive uv backend with dual npm+uv long-term support. Deliverables: uv CLI commands (stage/verify/publish), uv workflow backend for platform wheels to PyPI-compatible indexes, distributions.uv config+init scaffolding, tests, and migration/docs updates. Linux baseline manylinux2014. uv required for uv commands.
close_reason: Implemented dual npm+uv backend support (workflow, CLI, config/init, tests, docs)

title: Fix npm shim platform package resolution for global installs
description: Global installs of @omnidist/omnidist@0.1.1 fail because shim assumes platform package is sibling. Resolve package path with require.resolve and full scoped package name.
close_reason: Implemented shim fix (require.resolve + scoped package name), added regression test, and adjusted .gitignore path anchoring.

title: Validate npm distribution config before commands
description: Stage, verify, and publish assume cfg.Distributions["npm"] exists and is valid. Add central validation and clear user-facing error messages for missing/invalid fields.
close_reason: Added central npm distribution validation (presence, package required, access enum) and wired stage/verify/publish through it.
